author: danceratopz
content:
**Heads-up for EL client teams / Execution-Specs Fixture Consumers**  

**Test fixtures have a new directory layout ([#2134](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2134)).**

Previously, fixture JSON files accumulated test cases for every target fork in a single file, meaning each file grew with every new fork. Fixtures are now split into per-fork sub-directories, keeping file sizes bounded and letting you point your runner at exactly the fork you need to test.

The underlying JSON fixture formats / schemas have **not** changed.

All future releases will use this layout (**including the upcoming devnet-3 release**), and benchmark artifacts already do.

**If you have concerns or suggestions, please create a thread against this announcement.**

🧪 **Consensus fixtures**

Each target fork gets its own `for_{fork}/` directory. Below it, the test-source layout is preserved:

```
blockchain_tests_engine/
├── for_paris/
│   ├── paris/
│   │   ├── eip7610_create_collision/
│   │   ├── revert_in_create/
│   │   └── security/
│   └── shanghai/
│       └── eip3651_warm_coinbase/
└── for_shanghai/
    ├── paris/
    │   ├── eip7610_create_collision/
    │   └── ...
    └── shanghai/
        ├── eip3651_warm_coinbase/
        ├── eip3855_push0/
        ├── eip3860_initcode/
        └── eip4895_withdrawals/
```

To consume only one fork, point your runner at e.g. `blockchain_tests/for_osaka/`.

author: danceratopz
content:
⏱️ **Benchmark fixtures**

Benchmark fixtures add a second level: Either gas limit or opcode count:

1. `--gas-benchmark-values` produces `for_{fork}_at_{gas}M/` (zero-padded):

    ```text
    blockchain_tests_engine_x/
    ├── for_osaka_at_0001M/compute/precompile/bls12_381/
    ├── for_osaka_at_0002M/compute/precompile/bls12_381/
    └── for_osaka_at_0005M/compute/precompile/bls12_381/
    ```

2. `--fixed-opcode-count` produces `for_{fork}_at_opcount_{N}K/`:

    ```text
    blockchain_tests_engine_x/
    ├── for_osaka_at_opcount_1.5K/compute/precompile/bls12_381/
    └── for_osaka_at_opcount_2.0K/compute/precompile/bls12_381/
    ```

Docs: [Release Fixture Output Directory Structure for Consensus Tests](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/9460f9332968de9ce6370aeab3b1cc7af8b1f8f5/docs/running_tests/releases.md?#fixture-output-directory-structure) | [Benchmark Output Layout](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/9460f9332968de9ce6370aeab3b1cc7af8b1f8f5/docs/writing_tests/benchmarks.md?#benchmark-modes).
